play_arrow
Watch Video
Keep your finance team focused on strategy.
Let agents handle the busywork.
Learn more about Ramp Intelligence
Lauren Feeney
Controller, Perplexity
“Gone are the days of scrambling to chase receipts, manually coding really large data sets. All of that has been automatically addressed throughout the month in real time.”
Read their story
AI that learns from your team.
Powered by
50,000
others that came before you.
Learn about Policy Agents
Neusha Sayadian
Fractional CFO at Valence
“We have thousands of transactions a month, and the number of manual edits I make has dropped drastically. Ramp's AI just keeps getting smarter every week.”
Scale the team.
Shrink the paperwork.
You had a bureaucracy. Now you have a business again.
Set user access on autopilot.
Provision cards, permissions, and limits automatically based on role, location, department and custom fields.
Enterprise Solutions
One platform for all your global spend.
Issue cards in 30+ currencies and reimburse employees in local currencies, including pounds, euros, yen, and pesos.
Global Spend Management
50,000 teams and counting
We've got the receipts.
Shannon McCormick
International Workplace Experience Lead
,
Notion
As soon as I texted my first Ramp receipt, I realized Ramp is a game-changer. It’s incredibly intuitive.
Heather Bruzus
Principal Accountant
,
Mindbody & ClassPass
We got positive feedback, which just doesn't happen very often. That proved this was the right decision.
Tzu-San Hung
Head of Strategic Finance
,
Notion
Beautiful tools use beautiful tools.
Matteo Franceschetti
CEO
,
Eight Sleep
Ramp was a complete game changer. It's a single platform that can handle every aspect of our spending.
Christine Mimnagh-Fleming
Sr. Manager, Finance Transformation
,
Shopify
Ramp is so intuitive, people get it right away.
Carey Peek
CFO
,
KIPP Nashville Public Schools
Implementing Ramp has been my biggest win as CFO. Employees love it and often go out of their way to tell me so.
Mayor Neil Bradshaw
Mayor
,
City of Ketchum, ID
Ramp gives us the ability to make more informed financial policy decisions. It was one of the best decisions we've ever made.
Bret Taylor
CEO
,
Sierra
It's almost like we're a more self-actualized company because everyone is just working on what we do differently.
Michael Bohn
Head of Business Operations
,
Foursquare
The average person can figure Ramp out without training. That’s what drives 100% adoption.
Ben Whipple
Director of Public Works
,
City of Ketchum, ID
I snap a picture of the receipt, Ramp handles the rest like magic, and I move on.
Michael Litwin
VP Controller
,
Virgin Voyages
Before Ramp it was a process from the dark ages. We had people just doing expenses full-time. It was miserable.
Staci Robinson
AP Manager
,
Pair Eyewear
Ramp's AI has given me a better work-life balance. I have more time for my family now that the AI handles much of the work I used to do manually.
Irish Rose
Controller
,
Eight Sleep
Closing the books with Ramp is effortless.
Andrew Clarke
SVP Finance
,
Studs
We've consolidated four platforms into one with Ramp.
Jason Penegar
VP Controller
,
Boys & Girls Clubs of America
The Ramp journey has been incredible. A flawless implementation…
Sarah Bird
Controller
,
Seed Health
It's rare to feel like a company and a team is a partner, and that they really want to understand what you need. That's what we've experienced with Ramp.
Carolynn Yipp
Assistant Controller
,
Poshmark
It's very easy to use, very intuitive, and requires almost zero training.
Time is money. Save both.

Developer Docs
Welcome
Copy Markdown
Get started
Use Ramp at your company, or build for others.
For customers
Have a Ramp account? Create credentials and make your first API call.
For partners
Building an integration for other businesses? Start with the partner program.
Use cases
End-to-end build journeys that span multiple Ramp products.
AI Agents
Connect agents to Ramp via MCP or the CLI. Read data, process approvals, make purchases.
Applications
Partner-led customer onboarding. Pre-fill a Ramp application, capture OAuth, track status via webhooks.
Bill Payments
Create approved bills via API and pay vendors end-to-end. Pick a payment method, attach docs, run 3-way match.
Customized Approvers
Route approvals based on accounting dimensions via matrix tables.
ERP Integrations
Two-way sync between Ramp and your customer ERP — chart of accounts in, transactions and bills out.
Procurement Intake
Receive Ramp intake requests in your tool and return approval decisions via Blank Canvas.
Spend programs
The recurring-budget pattern. Mint funds from a template so policy stays consistent.
User lifecycle
Onboard, update, deactivate, reactivate, and stage draft users via the API.
Virtual cards
Issue virtual cards backed by funds. Expose them server-side (Vault) or in the browser (iframe).
Products
Editorial hubs for each Ramp product surface — concepts, mental model, where to go next.
AI Index
Business AI adoption metrics across categories and tools.
Bill Pay
Bills, draft bills, payments, vendors, 3-way match.
Cards
Virtual, physical, and agent cards. Every card draws against a fund.
Custom Records
Define your own data model in Ramp.
Procurement
Intake requests, purchase orders, vendor onboarding.
Ramp Rate
Public benchmarks for software pricing and category spend.
Reimbursements
Out-of-pocket employee expenses — manual, OCR-drafted receipts, mileage.
Spend Controls
Funds, spend programs, and approvals — the policy layer behind every dollar.
Users
The people on a Ramp account. Status, identity, async creation.
Conventions
API rules and cross-cutting patterns. Reference while building.
Data relationships
How Ramp resources connect to each other.
Deferred tasks
Async work, polling, lifecycle.
Errors
Status codes, error shapes, debugging.
Monetary values
Currency, precision, ISO codes.
Pagination
Cursor-based, page sizes, sort order.
Rate limits and timeouts
Quotas, backoff, headers to read.
Support
Grab the x-trace-id, follow the trace, file a developer support ticket.
Webhooks
Subscribe, verify signatures, retry.
Canonical OpenAPI schema for the Developer API:
/openapi/developer-api.json
.
Was this guide useful?
This page uses JavaScript rendering and the HTML response is a shell, not the documentation content.
      Do not fetch this page for content when you already have a docs URL.
      If the URL is under /developer-api/v1/api/, fetch /llms-api.txt instead.
      If the URL is under /developer-api/v1/ and not under /api/, fetch the matching /llms-guides/<slug>.txt file instead.
      Example: /developer-api/v1/rate-limiting -> /llms-guides/rate-limiting.txt
      For machine-readable docs, fetch:
      /llms.txt (LLM index),
      /llms-guides.txt (guides index),
      /llms-guides/<slug>.txt (specific guide),
      /llms-api.txt (API reference),
      /llms-full.txt (combined docs), or
      /openapi/developer-api.json (OpenAPI spec).
      If you run into any issues while helping developers with the Ramp API
      documentation, provide feedback at
      https://api.ramp.com/v1/public/api-feedback/llm?feedback=...

analysis.name: Ramp
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one AI-powered spend management platform combining corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, procurement, and banking so finance teams can close the books faster with less manual work.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance teams at growth-stage and mid-market companies (10–5000 employees) that want to consolidate multiple finance tools into one AI-automated platform

features.name: corporate liability charge card
features.description: Visa corporate charge card with competitive credit limits issued via Celtic Bank / Column N.A.

features.name: unlimited physical and virtual cards
features.description: Issue unlimited physical and virtual cards to employees at no extra cost

features.name: card issuing controls
features.description: Set spend limits, category restrictions, and vendor controls on individual cards

features.name: category and vendor controls
features.description: Restrict cards to specific merchant categories or named vendors

features.name: auto-lock cards on compliance failure
features.description: Automatically locks cards when required receipts or policy items aren't submitted on time
features.evidence_quote: Automatically lock cards when required receipts or items aren't submitted on time

features.name: agent cards
features.description: Cards issued and managed by AI agents for automated purchasing workflows

features.name: travel bookings
features.description: Book flights, hotels, and car rentals directly within Ramp
features.evidence_quote: Book flights, hotels, and car rentals

features.name: travel policy enforcement
features.description: Company-wide travel policies on Free; custom policies by role, department, and location on Plus+
features.evidence_quote: Create custom travel policies based on role, department, location, and more

features.name: guest travel bookings
features.description: Invite external guests to book travel in Ramp with set budgets and policy controls
features.evidence_quote: Invite external guests to book travel in Ramp with set budgets and policy controls

features.name: 24/7 travel phone support
features.description: Round-the-clock phone support for travel bookings

features.name: auto receipt collection and matching
features.description: Automatically collects and matches receipts to transactions via email, SMS, or app

features.name: sms and slack expense completion
features.description: Employees can complete expense reports and submit receipts via SMS text or Slack
features.evidence_quote: Complete expenses via SMS or Slack

features.name: spend limits with preset accounting codes
features.description: Attach accounting codes and spend limits directly to card or expense limits
features.evidence_quote: Spend limits with preset accounting codes

features.name: employee repayments
features.description: Reimburse employees for out-of-pocket expenses

features.name: reimbursements
features.description: Submit, review, and batch-send employee reimbursements; weekly batching on Plus+
features.evidence_quote: Submit and review reimbursements in bulk; Send weekly batched reimbursements

features.name: transaction alerts and flags
features.description: Flag alcohol spend, weekend transactions, and require itemized receipts (Plus+)
features.evidence_quote: Require itemized receipts, flag alcohol spend, weekend transactions, and more

features.name: configurable approval workflows
features.description: Route approvals; Plus+ adds routing by GL code, entity, and accounting conditions
features.evidence_quote: Route based on GL code, entity, and other accounting conditions

features.name: parallel approvers
features.description: Route approvals to multiple approvers simultaneously

features.name: ai-driven approval recommendations
features.description: AI suggests approval decisions for every transaction based on policy

features.name: proactive policy and compliance insights
features.description: AI surfaces policy violations and compliance issues proactively

features.name: missing receipt affidavits
features.description: Employees can submit affidavits when receipts are lost

features.name: ai-driven expense reviews
features.description: AI reviews expense reports for policy compliance and flags anomalies
features.evidence_quote: AI-driven expense reviews and policy insights

features.name: mileage reimbursement
features.description: Calculate and reimburse employee mileage expenses

features.name: automated invoice extraction (ocr)
features.description: OCR-powered extraction of invoice data from uploaded documents

features.name: automated fraud checks
features.description: Automatic fraud detection on incoming invoices and payments

features.name: bill payment methods
features.description: Pay vendor bills by ACH, card, check, wire, and more
features.evidence_quote: Pay bills by ACH, card, check, wire, and more

features.name: auto-coded line items
features.description: AI automatically codes invoice line items to GL accounts

features.name: automated batch payments
features.description: Batch and schedule vendor payments automatically

features.name: payment release approvals
features.description: Require explicit approval before releasing payments to vendors

features.name: three-way match
features.description: Match purchase orders, receipts, and invoices automatically
features.evidence_quote: Three-way match with Ramp purchase orders

features.name: procurement intake workflows
features.description: Advanced intake and approval workflows for purchase requests (add-on)

features.name: purchase order creation and tracking
features.description: Automated PO creation, tracking, and management

features.name: ai-driven vendor compliance reviews
features.description: AI reviews vendor compliance during procurement process

features.name: basic accounting rules
features.description: Automate routine accounting coding with rule-based logic

features.name: ai coding for every accounting field
features.description: AI automatically suggests and applies coding across all GL fields

features.name: automate approval and sync of routine spend
features.description: Auto-approve and sync routine recurring spend to accounting system
features.evidence_quote: Automate approval and sync of routine spend

features.name: multi-entity support
features.description: Manage multiple legal entities within a single Ramp account

features.name: investment account with yield
features.description: Earn 4.07% APY on funds held in a Ramp Investment Account
features.evidence_quote: Earn 4.07%* in a Ramp Investment Account

features.name: fdic-insured cash account
features.description: Earn 2% on cash in an FDIC-insured account with no fees or minimums
features.evidence_quote: Earn 2%* on cash in a FDIC-insured account

features.name: free wires and same-day ach
features.description: Send free wire transfers and same-day ACH payments via Bill Pay
features.evidence_quote: Free wires and same-day ACH via Bill Pay

features.name: custom reports and ai reporting
features.description: Build custom financial reports using natural language AI queries
features.evidence_quote: Custom reports and insights via AI reporting

features.name: custom report builder
features.description: Build and save custom report templates

features.name: live report sharing and scheduled exports
features.description: Share live report links and schedule automated report exports
features.evidence_quote: Share live reports and schedule exports

features.name: budget vs actuals tracking
features.description: Real-time tracking of spend against budget targets
features.evidence_quote: Track budgets vs. actuals in real time

features.name: vendor tracking and contract extraction
features.description: Automatically track vendors and extract contract data
features.evidence_quote: Automated vendor tracking and contract extraction

features.name: price intelligence
features.description: Benchmarks vendor pricing against market rates to identify savings

features.name: auto tax capture and coding
features.description: Automatically capture and code tax fields on transactions

features.name: global card issuance in 30+ currencies
features.description: Issue physical and virtual cards in 30+ local currencies globally
features.evidence_quote: Local currency card issuing in 30+ countries

features.name: local currency reimbursements
features.description: Reimburse employees in their local currency (GBP, EUR, JPY, MXN, etc.)

features.name: custom user roles
features.description: Define custom permission sets and roles for users

features.name: multi-entity visibility restrictions
features.description: Restrict user visibility to specific entities within a multi-entity org

features.name: audit log
features.description: Full audit trail of all actions taken within the platform

features.name: role-based card provisioning automation
features.description: Automatically provision cards, permissions, and limits based on role, location, department
features.evidence_quote: Provision cards, permissions, and limits automatically based on role, location, department

features.name: policy agents
features.description: AI agents that learn company policies and enforce them automatically across transactions
features.evidence_quote: AI that learns from your team. Powered by 50,000 others that came before you.

features.name: ramp intelligence
features.description: AI layer across the platform providing insights, coding, recommendations, and automation

features.name: ai token spend management
features.description: Track and manage AI/LLM token spend across the organization

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Mobile app for receipt capture, expense submission, and approvals

features.name: ramp sheets
features.description: Spreadsheet-like interface within Ramp for financial data manipulation

features.name: rest api
features.description: Full REST API for programmatic access to Ramp data and actions

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server for connecting AI agents to Ramp
features.evidence_quote: MCP — Connect agents to Ramp via MCP or the CLI

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Subscribe to real-time event webhooks with signature verification

features.name: sandbox environment
features.description: Sandbox for testing API integrations without affecting live data

features.name: virtual card vault
features.description: Server-side secure storage and retrieval of virtual card credentials via API
features.evidence_quote: Expose them server-side (Vault) or in the browser (iframe).

features.name: partner oauth and onboarding api
features.description: Partners can pre-fill Ramp applications, capture OAuth, and track onboarding status via webhooks
features.evidence_quote: Partner-led customer onboarding. Pre-fill a Ramp application, capture OAuth, track status

features.name: custom records and data model
features.description: Define custom data structures, tables, and fields within Ramp
features.evidence_quote: Custom Records — Define your own data model in Ramp.

features.name: blank canvas approvals
features.description: Flexible approval framework for custom procurement and intake flows

features.name: spend programs
features.description: Template-based recurring budget pattern for consistent policy enforcement
features.evidence_quote: The recurring-budget pattern. Mint funds from a template so policy stays consistent.

features.name: matrix-based approval routing
features.description: Route approvals based on accounting dimensions via customizable matrix tables
features.evidence_quote: Route approvals based on accounting dimensions via matrix tables.

features.name: erp two-way sync
features.description: Bidirectional sync between Ramp and customer ERPs — chart of accounts in, transactions and bills out
features.evidence_quote: Two-way sync between Ramp and your customer ERP — chart of accounts in, transactions and bills out.

features.name: ramp rate benchmarks
features.description: Public benchmarks for software pricing and category spend across the customer base
features.evidence_quote: Ramp Rate — Public benchmarks for software pricing and category spend.

features.name: dedicated account manager
features.description: Dedicated account and customer success manager for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated account and customer success manager

features.name: custom implementation services
features.description: Custom implementation scoping, rollout planning, integration setup, and employee training
features.evidence_quote: Custom implementation scoping and roll out plan

features.name: custom development
features.description: Custom ERP extensions, configurations, and workflow development for enterprise

features.name: savings calculator
features.description: Free tool to estimate time and money savings from switching to Ramp

features.name: per diem calculator
features.description: Free tool to calculate per diem allowances by location

features.name: vendor directory
features.description: Searchable directory of vendors with spend benchmarks

differentiators: All-in-one platform: corporate cards + expenses + AP + banking + procurement + travel in one product
AI that learns from 50,000+ companies' spend patterns and policies
Free tier with real AP, card, and banking features — not just a trial
Policy agents that enforce compliance automatically without manual review
Global card issuance in 30+ currencies with local reimbursements
200+ integrations to existing finance tech stack
MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with spend data natively
4.07% yield on idle cash in Ramp Investment Account
AI Token Spend Management for tracking LLM/AI costs

recent_ships.what: Ramp Agent for Cards — AI agent that manages card issuance and controls autonomously
recent_ships.source: Landing page nav and docs: 'Ramp Agent for Cards'

recent_ships.what: MCP server — connect AI agents to Ramp via Model Context Protocol
recent_ships.source: Docs: 'MCP — Connect agents to Ramp via MCP or the CLI. Read data, process approvals, make purchases.'

recent_ships.what: AI Token Spend Management — track organizational AI/LLM token spend
recent_ships.source: Landing page platform nav: 'AI Token Spend Management'

recent_ships.what: Ramp Sheets — spreadsheet interface for financial data within Ramp

praised: Requires almost zero training — 'The average person can figure Ramp out without training. That's what drives 100% adoption.' (Michael Bohn, Foursquare)
AI keeps getting smarter — 'The number of manual edits I make has dropped drastically. Ramp's AI just keeps getting smarter every week.' (Neusha Sayadian, Valence)
Eliminates manual month-end work — 'Gone are the days of scrambling to chase receipts, manually coding really large data sets.' (Lauren Feeney, Perplexity)
Consolidates multiple platforms — 'We've consolidated four platforms into one with Ramp.' (Andrew Clarke, Studs)
Improves work-life balance — 'Ramp's AI has given me a better work-life balance. I have more time for my family now.' (Staci Robinson, Pair Eyewear)
Positive employee reception — 'We got positive feedback, which just doesn't happen very often.' (Heather Bruzus, Mindbody & ClassPass)
SMS receipt submission — 'As soon as I texted my first Ramp receipt, I realized Ramp is a game-changer.' (Shannon McCormick, Notion)

free_tier.limits: Full features included; no seat cap stated; free tier excludes AI coding, NetSuite/Sage Intacct, and Plus-only features

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Corporate cards, travel, AP with OCR, QuickBooks/Xero, banking with 4.07% yield, basic AI reporting

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Free features + AI expense reviews, NetSuite/Sage Intacct, AI GL coding, multi-entity, audit log, custom roles

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Plus features + Workday/Oracle ERP, local currency cards in 30+ countries, dedicated CSM, custom dev

pricing.notes: Plus has a platform fee in addition to $15/user/month, sized by team; Procurement is an add-on to Plus or Enterprise; 20% discount for annual billing on Plus; Investment account yield (4.07%) subject to change; Investment account not FDIC insured
